## TRM1.1. Additional time in taxi-out phase (PI#4)

Warsaw is the only Polish airport subject to the monitoring of this indicator. The additional time in 2025 increased to 3.15 min/dep, 5% above the 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 3.00 min/dep (*using the new methodology*).

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 3.61 min/dep.
